item.title: Duplicate CLI commands section in groom agent prompts — factor out shared preamble
item.intent: Eliminate the ~8 lines of duplicated CLI command reference between product-owner.md and tech-lead.md by extracting a shared section or having the orchestrator inject it
steps: Compare the CLI commands sections in product-owner.md and tech-lead.md
Extract shared content to a common block injected by build_agent_prompt() in the orchestrator
Keep role-specific differences (--type feat vs --type bug) in the individual prompts
acceptanceCriteria: No duplicated CLI command text exists across agent prompt files
Both groom agents still receive full CLI command guidance
